scripts.preinstall: node -e "['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock'].forEach(f => require('fs').existsSync(f) && require('fs').unlinkSync(f)); if(process.env.npm_config_user_agent && !process.env.npm_config_user_agent.includes('pnpm')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev:web: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env PORT=20898 pnpm --filter @workspace/gomi-sense run dev
